title: volkameria schenkii
intro: Volkameria schenkii, also known as the Chinese rose or rose of China, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Volkameria schenkii has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, as well as to promote skin health and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
